title: The acceleration is here!
summary: Google released Co-scientist and Robin, AI agent systems that automate medical and scientific discoveries. These systems have identified new treatments for cancer, antibiotic resistance, vision loss, and other conditions by outperforming human experts in hypothesis generation and experimental design.
